summary: Iteration 14 — welcome/tour/admin/composer parity. Pre-login welcome screen, 5-step WelcomeTour, equalizer CSS, and admin auto-assignment in DB all verified. Two CRITICAL bugs blocking feature delivery: (1) /api/auth/me and /api/auth/process-session do NOT serialize role/is_admin, so the admin-only ProfileDrawer toggles will never render even though auth_service.upsert_user correctly stores role='admin' in DB. (2) Continue as Guest click renders CaosShell for ~100ms then the axios 401 interceptor in App.js redirects back to / because /api/caos/* endpoints 401 for unauthenticated guests — guest mode is effectively non-functional.

critical.issue: Response body omits role and is_admin fields. auth_service.upsert_user correctly writes {role:'admin', is_admin:true} for mytaxicloud@gmail.com to mongo, but whoami in /app/backend/app/routes/auth.py:58-66 only returns user_id/email/name/picture. ProfileDrawer.js checks profile.role==='admin' and profile.is_admin===true, so admin UI will never activate. Fix: add role/is_admin to the return dict in both /auth/me and /auth/process-session.

ui_bugs.issue: Continue as Guest path is broken. Clicking the guest button sets user='guest' and mounts CaosShell, but the useCaosShell hook immediately fires /api/caos/* requests which return 401. The global axios 401 interceptor in /app/frontend/src/App.js lines 15-26 then calls window.location.replace('/') kicking the user right back to the welcome screen. Result: clicking Continue as Guest appears to do nothing (page briefly shows 'Verifying session...' then welcome screen re-renders). Fix options: (a) gate the interceptor on user!=='guest'; (b) skip protected API calls in useCaosShell when authenticatedUser.role==='guest'; or (c) add a public/guest-mode backend contract.

integration_issues.issue: Even after seeding mytaxicloud@gmail.com with role='admin' in mongo, the frontend cannot show Developer Mode / Multi-Agent Mode / System Console toggles because /api/auth/me doesn't return role or is_admin. Blocked until backend bug above is fixed.

action_items: FIX (backend HIGH): Add role and is_admin to return dict of /api/auth/me (routes/auth.py line 61-66) and /api/auth/process-session response (line 50-55).

FIX (frontend CRITICAL): Repair Continue-as-Guest flow. Either skip the axios 401 interceptor redirect when the in-memory user is 'guest', or gate useCaosShell network calls on user.role !== 'guest'. Current behaviour: click does nothing from user's perspective.

VERIFY after fixes: (a) seed admin user, hit /auth/me, expect role='admin' & is_admin=true in JSON; (b) click Continue as Guest, expect caos-shell-root + caos-composer-shell to remain mounted indefinitely; (c) confirm per-message footer shows fulldate + latency on a real assistant reply (could not exercise because guest flow was broken).
critical_code_review_comments: auth_service.upsert_user correctly stamps role/is_admin on every login (idempotent). Good.
WelcomeTour.js click-outside handler invokes handleSkip on overlay click which sets the completed flag — matches spec.

Composer.js joinDraft correctly appends transcription to existing draft separated by space (line 166 for streaming and 179/182 for final). STT append-at-cursor semantics look correct by code review (runtime test blocked by lack of microphone in headless browser).

MessagePane.formatFullDate implementation matches spec (e.g. 'Apr 21, 2026 · 1:00 AM'). Latency rendered as '· 28.5s' green span when linkedReceipt.latency_ms is present. data-testids caos-message-fulldate-<id> / caos-message-latency-<id> are wired correctly.
App.js axios 401 interceptor is too aggressive — it breaks any non-authenticated flow that touches /api/caos/*. Needs a guest/public bypass.
LoginScreen buttons carry correct data-testids and copy — spec-matched.

success_rate.backend: 50% (2/4 pytest cases pass — 2 admin cases fail because API omits role/is_admin)
success_rate.frontend: 90% pre-login welcome + tour PASS; Guest flow FAIL

test_credentials: Seeded test sessions via _seed_session helper in backend_test file. Used mytaxicloud@gmail.com to verify admin path and a TEST_regular_* email for the non-admin path.
seed_data_creation: Created ephemeral users: mytaxicloud@gmail.com (admin) and TEST_regular_<uuid>@example.com (user), each with a 24h user_sessions row.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-login welcome, 5-step tour, skip/click-outside/complete paths all verified PASS with localStorage persistence. Admin DB assignment is correct in mongo but the two /api/auth/* endpoints must be fixed to return role+is_admin before the admin UI can be validated end-to-end. Continue-as-Guest must be repaired before any guest-mode UI (composer, equalizer, message footer, fulldate/latency) can be exercised in the browser — recommend routing through a real seeded session cookie to test those remaining items after the guest fix lands.
rca of the issue: Guest bug RCA: AuthGate.handleContinueAsGuest sets user='guest' and renders CaosShell. CaosShell -> useCaosShell useEffect immediately fires protected /api/caos/* requests. Backend returns 401 (expected). Global axios interceptor in App.js matches url.includes('/api/caos/') and unconditionally executes window.location.replace('/'). The page fully reloads, AuthGate starts from scratch with user=null and /api/auth/me 401, ending on LoginScreen. Net effect: user sees a brief 'Verifying session...' flash then is back on welcome. Fix: have the interceptor inspect an in-memory flag (e.g. window.__CAOS_GUEST__) or simply check document.cookie for 'session_token' — if there's no cookie, do not redirect. Admin role RCA: upsert_user writes role+is_admin correctly to DB (verified by direct mongo inspection) but routes/auth.py:61-66 whoami handler hand-picks only 4 fields to return, dropping role/is_admin. One-line fix.
